item.title: Financing as Insurance
item.description: Say you have limited savings, but discover you must make a sizeable purchase. This is a purchase you could afford, but would significantly eat away at your savings. In this situation, going broke is a possibility if you happen to lose your job soon after. One approach is to instead treat financing like insurance. In this case, treat the interest as a premium paid. Instead of heavily reducing your bankroll, a monthly payment is made over a longer period of time.
